title: tengine.session.stop v1
description: Fires on silo shutdown. Producer: tengine silo_tester via the registry handle SESSION_STOP in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/event_registry.rs. Carries the final frame count and the rolling-average FPS at exit so consumers can compute session-level summaries without subscribing to the full tengine.session.frame stream.

frame.description: final GPU frame index advanced before shutdown

fps_avg.description: rolling-average FPS at the moment of shutdown
